value: I'm sorry you're experiencing this frustrating issue with your battery. A jump from 1% to 100% in just 2 minutes does sound unusual and suggests the battery meter may not be reading accurately rather than a true charge. Since you've already tried battery optimization and a full restore on version 11.1.2, I'd like to help get this sorted. Could you let me know your device model and whether this started happening after a recent update or incident? In the meantime, try a hard reset (power off completely, wait a minute, then power back on) to see if that recalibrates the battery indicator. Let me know what you find and we'll take it from there.
